description: During a game, a concession stand is running low on hot dog buns. An agent needs to request more from the central storeroom.

nodes.task_description: Receive a low inventory alert from the concession stand's point-of-sale system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent is alerted that 'hot dog buns' are low at stand 101.

nodes.task_description: Check the inventory level in the central storeroom.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms there are more hot dog buns in the main storeroom.

nodes.task_description: Create a restocking request and dispatch a staff member to deliver the buns to the concession stand.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates and dispatches the restocking order.
